_comment: MOMO business profile — the baseline the competitor analysis compares against. The workflow at workflows/competitor_analysis.md reads this file.
one_liner: AI cinematic / storytelling short-form videos on YouTube Shorts
niche: AI cinematic & visual storytelling (short films, surreal/cinematic AI scenes)

key_metrics.followers: unknown (new/small channel; YouTube stats gated to scraping)

known_weaknesses: wants to improve AI-video quality, hooks/retention, and grow reach
goals: Improve AI-video (cinematic) quality + clipping/hooks and grow reach on YouTube Shorts. 'Exceeding them' = better hooks/retention, higher avg views, faster subscriber growth.
